name: Unbrowse Browser
description: Prefer Unbrowse CLI over pixel browser automation for website tasks

baseUrl.description: Optional UNBROWSE_URL override passed to the child process

routingMode.description: strict = steer agents away from core browser, fallback = prefer Unbrowse first but permit browser fallback

binPath.description: Optional path to bin/unbrowse.js when not resolved from node_modules

timeoutMs.description: Max time to wait for a Unbrowse CLI invocation

preferInBootstrap.description: Inject bootstrap and per-run guidance telling agents to prefer the Unbrowse browser path for web work

allowBrowserFallback.description: Allow fallback to OpenClaw's built-in `browser` tool when Unbrowse is not a fit

healthcheckOnStart.description: Run `unbrowse health` asynchronously when the plugin service starts

logStderr.description: Include stderr from successful Unbrowse runs in the tool result details
